ab: nasuljivat mun. tucu uri patagilj a nga itjen.
ch: 大家好。現在我們要開始了。
en: Hello everyone. Now we are going to start.

ab: gacalju! sukubi!
nasuljivat sun sinsi.
en: B: Hello.

ab: pai qiladju.
en: A: Please sit down.

ab: nasuljivat mun. tucu uri temulu ti sinsi tjanumun tua kemuda a qivu ta lami na kacalisiyan.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的排灣語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say Paiwan for food.

ab: pulingalingav mun ta kai ni sinsi?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: sinsi, inika ken a pulingalingav. makaya sun a qivu a kingtalj anga?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: inika ken a lemangdanda, makaya pasiqaca a pagalju?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: pai pacunu a pasa maza! kisaseljangu tjanuaken a semupu.
ch: 請看這裡!跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.

ab: pariya a su sinupuan.
en: It’s very well read.

ab: supu-u a kingtalj anga. pai pasiqaca-u.
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.

ab: pai maliceng. maya qivu.
en: Please be quiet. Don’t talk.

ab: pai alapu ta nu sunat.
en: A: Please take out your textbook.

ab: ui, sinsi.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: alapu ta nu inpic.
en: A: Please take out your pen.

ab: sinsi, malim anga ken a kemacu ta ku inpic.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: alapu ta nu si’uli’ulip.
en: A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: sinsi, malim anga ken a kemacu ta si’uli’ulip.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: kisedjamu tjai tjaqedjiqedji a su salasaladj.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: pasedjami aken ta su siquliqulip?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?

ab: siputidetideqan anga zikan tua tja kitulu.
en: Class is over.

ab: tja patjemaza-u a tja kitulu, cevucevungi anga nu tjaivililj.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
